'''Orflon''' was a frozen, uncharted [[asteroid]] located near the [[Demophon system/Legends|Demophon system]]. It was the location of [[Asteroid Base]], the only permanent [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] base near [[Demophon]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was so remote that it was not even inhabited by [[Mynock/Legends|mynocks]].<ref name="EJ" />

{{Ast-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[Jason Fry]], co-author of ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', indicated in [[June]] [[2015]] that Orflon was excluded from [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|''The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion]] because it was a wandering astronomical object.<ref name="Email">{{EmailCite|email=File:EAOC discussion.jpg|creator=Jason Fry|date=2015-06-30}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=The Evacuation of Jatee|book=Supernova (sourcebook)}} {{1st}}
